## Summary

A brief description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? How does it benefit users of this library or the `react-native-image-editor` bridge?

## Proposed API / Behaviour

If applicable, describe how the feature would be used:

```swift
photoEditor.someNewOption = true
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, or links to related issues.
